title: Arlington, VA — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Arlington, VA: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Arlington is a city in VA with a population of 240,000. Urban county across the Potomac from DC with the Pentagon and a vibrant Rosslyn-Ballston corridor.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
